title: Let us know your thoughts about the mobile CRM
excerpt:

posts.author: elkemoshel (Elke Moshel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently working on improving our CRM product mobile app, and we would love to hear your feedback!
If you have used our app, we would appreciate it if you could take a minute to answer a short survey about your experience.
Your feedback will help us identify areas for improvement and ensure that our app provides the best possible user experience.
Let us know what you think here in the link here.
